heading: Audits by Comptroller General
label: 182d Audits by Comptroller General
text: Each of the revolving funds established under sections 182a to 182d of this title shall be subject to audit by the Comptroller General at the Comptroller General’s discretion.
notes: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to fiscal year 2002 and each succeeding fiscal year, see , set out as a note under .section 105 of Pub. L. 106–481section 182a of this title
